purpose: Read AGENTS.MD, repository context, memory, branch state, dirty worktree, and relevant synchronized documents before proposing changes.
Convert wall discussion into purpose, solved problem, scope, non-scope, existing-feature impact, document updates, tests, and risk.
Produce implementation targets, order, document sync policy, verification, recovery, and approval boundaries before writing runtime code.
Implement scoped changes with fast local feedback while preserving release-gate stop conditions.
Run medium verification for changed owner layers before heavy release proof.
Prove implemented behavior with synchronized documents, structure checks, aggregate checks, full hooks, and PR CI before merge.
After approved merge, verify main CI, local/remote synchronization, and approval-bound cleanup planning.
